narrative:
Saline Twp township has 780 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.9 percentage points.
